title: You need to do a hip hop classical album
content:
You need to do a hip hop classical album
Like interludes of classical pieces that break up with hip hop tracks in between
Will be sick to hear this done. Almost seems like it's in the same key as King by kanye

Bipolar. Antisemite. And I'm still. The king. I was humming it over the beat and it fit so well
Bringing me back in 2018. I feel like nick needs to throw some guitar over this bitch.
I like the guitar line you already have in there, I just feel like Nick could compliment it really well

Dustin:
I like it. Kinda feel like Sean out-rapped Em on here a little bit actually
That would be dope. It brought me back too
I love this idea. I shall ponder. Could write several classical songs, then sample them for the beats they bleed into it
A:
Fuck yes

D:
PS new Lupe album is amazing
Concept is if Amy Winehouse didn’t die and became a battle rapper instead, since she said toward the end of her life that all she could think of was beautiful battle raps
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1lZfudw4mHFrPgeVBHtsMI6OC72U71-tM/view?usp=drivesdk
context: From document: Conversations on Music and Art and Life — chunk 5 (chunk 5/10)
